author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Fifth Season of 'Youkoso Jitsuryoku Shijou Shugi no Kyoushitsu e' Announced
The 16th and final episode of the Youkoso Jitsuryoku Shijou Shugi no Kyoushitsu e 4th Season (Classroom of the Elite 4th Season) anime series announced a fifth season on Wednesday, revealing a celebratory visual (pictured). The first three seasons adapting Shougo Kinugasa's school psychological light novel—also known by its short title You-Zitsu—aired in Summer 2017, Summer 2022, and Winter 2024, followed by the fourth season premiered on April 1 with a 90-minute special featuri...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'The One Piece' Unveils Returning Lead Cast, Additional Staff, Teaser Promo
The Annecy International Animation Film Festival 2026 unveiled the returning lead cast, additional staff, and teaser promotional video for WIT Studio's The One Piece anime remake on Wednesday. The new anime series will begin with the Higashi no Umi-hen (Eastern Sea Arc) and is scheduled to be released on Netflix in February 2027. Voice actress Mayumi Tanaka (Dandadan) is returning to reprise her leading role as Monkey D. Luffy. Staff Main Animation: Taisei Kudou (Moonrise) Art Design: Kazus...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Mixed Media Project 'Re:bel Robotica' Announces TV Anime Adaptation
Amuse Creative Studio announced a television anime adaptation of illustrator Mika Pikazo's Re:bel Robotica mixed-media franchise on Wednesday, revealing a teaser visual (pictured). The teaser promotional video will be revealed at the Anime Expo 2026 convention on July 4. Illustrator Mika Pikazo, sci-fi novelist Ryou Yoshigami, and publishing company Arch are credited for the original concept, with Pikazo also handling the original character designs. The project originally began as a self-pu...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Sakamoto Days 2nd Season' Reveals New Staff, Additional Cast, Second Teaser Promo for Winter 2027
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Yuuto Suzuki's Sakamoto Days manga revealed new staff, additional cast, a second teaser visual (pictured), and second teaser promotional video for the second season on Wednesday. The second season is scheduled to premiere worldwide exclusively on Netflix in January 2027. Cast Amane Yotsumura: Kikunosuke Toya (Chainsaw Man) Etsuko Satoda: Misa Watanabe (One Piece) Satoru Yotsumura: Shinshuu Fuji (Pluto) Staff Director: Daisuke Nakaj...
